query:
-- Step 1: Delete notifications linked to test deals
DELETE FROM notifications 
WHERE type = 'new_lead' 
  AND (body LIKE '%testlead@%' 
    OR body LIKE '%idempotent@%' 
    OR body LIKE '%metalead@%' 
    OR body LIKE '%notiftest@%' 
    OR body LIKE '%nodup@%' 
    OR body LIKE '%metanotif@%');

-- Step 2: Delete event logs from test leads
DELETE FROM lead_event_log 
WHERE dedupeKey LIKE 'landing:test-%' 
   OR dedupeKey LIKE 'landing:idempotent-%' 
   OR dedupeKey LIKE 'meta_lead_ads:meta-%' 
   OR dedupeKey LIKE 'landing:notif-test-%'
   OR dedupeKey LIKE 'landing:no-dup-notif-%'
   OR dedupeKey LIKE 'meta_lead_ads:meta-notif-%';

-- Step 3: Delete deal_history for test deals
DELETE FROM deal_history WHERE dealId IN (
  SELECT id FROM deals 
  WHERE title LIKE '%Test Lead • %' 
     OR title LIKE '%Idempotent Lead • %' 
     OR title LIKE '%Meta Lead • %' 
     OR title LIKE '%Notification Test Lead • %' 
     OR title LIKE '%No Dup Notif • %'
     OR title LIKE '%Meta Notif Lead • %'
);

-- Step 4: Delete test deals
DELETE FROM deals 
WHERE title LIKE '%Test Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Idempotent Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%Notification Test Lead • %' 
   OR title LIKE '%No Dup Notif • %'
   OR title LIKE '%Meta Notif Lead • %';

-- Step 5: Delete test contacts (only those created by tests with test email patterns)
DELETE FROM contacts 
WHERE email IN ('testlead@example.com', 'idempotent@example.com', 'metalead@example.com', 'notiftest@example.com', 'nodup@example.com', 'metanotif@example.com');
